title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 455 至 540 行，共 648 行) ---
 455 |         """
 456 |         存储 MemoryItem 到长期记忆。
 457 | 
 458 |         Args:
 459 |             item: 长期知识条目
 460 | 
 461 |         Returns:
 462 |             存储的文件路径
 463 |         """
 464 |         timestamp = item.updated_at.replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
 465 |         filename = f"memory_item_{item.id}_{timestamp}.json"
 466 |         file_path = self.storage_dir / filename
 467 | 
 468 |         try:
 469 |             with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 470 |                 json.dump(item.to_dict(), f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 471 | 
 472 |             old_file = self.item_index.get(item.id)
 473 |             if old_file and old_file != file_path and old_file.exists():
 474 |                 old_file.unlink()
 475 | 
 476 |             self.item_index[item.id] = file_path
 477 |             self._remove_id_from_inverted_index(self.item_inverted_index, item.id)
 478 | 
 479 |             keywords = self._extract_item_keywords(item.to_dict())
 480 |             for keyword in keywords:
 481 |                 if keyword not in self.item_inverted_index:
 482 |                     self.item_inverted_index[keyword] = []
 483 |                 if item.id not in self.item_inverted_index[keyword]:
 484 |                     self.item_inverted_index[keyword].append(item.id)
 485 | 
 486 |             self._save_index()
 487 |             return str(file_path)
 488 |         except Exception as e:
 489 |             print(f"⚠️ 存储 MemoryItem 失败: {e}")
 490 |             return ""
 491 | 
 492 |     def retrieve_item(self, item_id: str) -> Optional[MemoryItem]:
 493 |         """根据 item_id 检索 MemoryItem。"""
 494 |         file_path = self.item_index.get(item_id)
 495 |         if not file_path or not file_path.exists():
 496 |             return None
 497 | 
 498 |         try:
 499 |             with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 500 |                 data = json.load(f)
 501 |                 return MemoryItem.from_dict(data)
 502 |         except Exception as e:
 503 |             print(f"⚠️ 读取 MemoryItem 失败: {e}")
 504 |             return None
 505 | 
 506 |     def search_items(self, query: str, top_k: int = 10, include_archived: bool = False) -> List[MemoryRecallResult]:
 507 |         """关键词检索 MemoryItem，返回统一召回结果。"""
 508 |         query_keywords = self._tokenize(query)
 509 |         if not query_keywords:
 510 |             return []
 511 | 
 512 |         scores: Dict[str, float] = {}
 513 |         matched_terms: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
 514 |         for keyword in query_keywords:
 515 |             for item_id in self.item_inverted_index.get(keyword, []):
 516 |                 scores[item_id] = scores.get(item_id, 0.0) + 1.0
 517 |                 matched_terms.setdefault(item_id, []).append(keyword)
 518 | 
 519 |         results: List[MemoryRecallResult] = []
 520 |         for item_id, keyword_score in scores.items():
 521 |             item = self.retrieve_item(item_id)
 522 |             if not item:
 523 |                 continue
 524 |             if not include_archived and item.status != MemoryStatus.ACTIVE.value:
 525 |                 continue
 526 | 
 527 |             normalized_score = keyword_score + item.importance + item.confidence * 0.5
 528 |             reason = "匹配关键词: " + ", ".join(sorted(set(matched_terms.get(item_id, []))))
 529 |             results.append(MemoryRecallResult(
 530 |                 item=item,
 531 |                 score=normalized_score,
 532 |                 source="long_term_items",
 533 |                 reason=reason,
 534 |             ))
 535 | 
 536 |         results.sort(key=lambda result: result.score, reverse=True)
 537 |         return results[:top_k]
 538 | 
 539 |     def get_all_items(self) -> List[MemoryItem]:
 540 |         """获取所有 MemoryItem。"""
--- 读取完毕 ---
